title: gentiana intricata var. subintricata
intro: Gentiana intricata var. subintricata, also known as the Subintricate Gentian, is a variety of the Gentiana intricata plant, which is a type of flowering plant in the Gentianaceae family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Gentiana intricata var. subintricata are attributed to its ability to support digestive health, reduce stress and anxiety, and boost the immune system. Gentiana intricata var. subintricata can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are commonly used to harness its medicinal properties.
